description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that performs CodeQL analysis and packages a Ubuntu 22.04 Qt6 MuPDF project. The workflow should be triggered manually and run on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with read permissions for actions, contents, and write permissions for security-events. It should analyze C++ code, install dependencies, configure the project with specific CMake options, build and package the project, and upload the debian package and CodeQL report as artifacts.
